_purpose: Part 5c Část 2 — cross-verification consolidated report (Part 2A family + 2B WebSearch + 2C sanity chains)

821-1.evidence: catalog 801-1/821-1 are TKP category prefixes, not 9-digit URS leaves. Real žárové zinkování → 783201001 family

801-1.evidence: TKP 801-1 = 'Budovy zděné a monolitické' (catalog), not leaf code. Real výztuž kari → 274361xxx or similar 9-digit leaf

832911111.evidence: TKP 832 not for ZS (zařízení staveniště is TKP 012/013/032). Code not findable in URS mirrors. Real ZS → 012103xxx family

997013871.evidence: URS 997013871 = 'Poplatek za uložení stavebního odpadu na recyklační skládce (skládkovné) směsného stavebního' — verified via cs-urs.cz + Czech tender mirrors. 3-item collision (sklad+dum+odpad) is legitimate use.

family_mismatches_pattern04._note: 55 MISMATCH items per family check. Manual triage:
legitimate_pattern_04_cross_category: HSV-1 items with 564/596/451 codes — anglický dvorek + terasa dlažba (TKP 5 'komunikace' work classified under HSV-1 zemní per project workflow grouping)
HSV-2 items with 327/711 codes — bednění bílé vany (TKP 327) + těsnění (TKP 711) in HSV-2 chapter
HSV-3 items with 767/962 codes — ostění úhelníky (zámeč 767) + podstojkování (demolice 962) in HSV-3 chapter
HSV-4 items with 342/974/979/271/631/713/771 codes — multi-trade items grouped under vodorovné konstrukce
HSV-5 items with 411 codes — ocelové vaznice HEA/sloupky JEKL classified as ocel TKP 411
HSV-6 items with various 7xx codes — bourání of different trades grouped under bourání chapter

critical_findings: 3 items had INVALID codes (821-1, 801-1, 832911111) — blanked via WebSearch verification
22 URS code collisions detected — 1 verified legitimate (997013871 skládkovné), other 21 mostly per-podlaží splits + reusable demolice codes (NOT flagged as problematic)
Sanity chain Sklad WC=3 ✓, Vana=1 ✓, demontáže OK ✓, ETICS balance perfect (276.7 ≈ 276.7 ≈ 290.2 m²), podlahy 217.4 vs TZ 219.3 ±0.9 %
Sanity chain false-positives: Umyvadlo/Sprcha/Dřez filter caught baterie items mentioning multiple fixtures; not a data bug
55 family MISMATCH items: ~52 are Pattern 04 cross-category (legitimate workflow vs catalog), 3 INVALID (now blanked)
recommendation_for_kros_excel: Apply WebSearch BLANK_OUT to 3 items (821-1, 801-1, 832911111) — these become MANUAL LOOKUP in KROS Pozn. column. Keep 22 URS collisions as-is (they're legitimate). Document 52 Pattern 04 MISMATCH as informational in audit (not actionable). Excel regeneration needed to reflect blanked codes.
